revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:User:Nardog/AutoTestcases]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
==See also== *[[User:Nardog/TemplatePreviewGuard]]
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}[[Category:reimport]]

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

{{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FAutoTestcases here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Nardog%2FAutoTestcases for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Infobox Wikipedia user script |name=AutoTestcases |desc=<onlyinclude>Autofills "Preview page with this template" with the most relevant /testcases page that exists</onlyinclude> |browsers=Chrome, Firefox, etc. |source=[[User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js]] }}
This script fills in the "Preview page with this template" field with the closest /testcases page that exists when editing a template or module.
For example, if you're editing "Template:Foo/bar/baz" or "Template:Foo/bar/baz/sandbox", it checks for *Template:Foo/bar/baz/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/bar" or "Module:Foo/bar/sandbox", it checks for *Module talk:Foo/bar/testcases *Module talk:Foo/testcases *Template:Foo/bar/testcases *Template:Foo/testcases and if any of them exist, it fills in the field with whichever comes first.
If you're editing "Module:Foo/testcases", it fills in the field with "Module talk:Foo/testcases" even if it doesn't exist.
If the field is not empty when the script is run, it doesn't do anything.
==Installation== Add the following to [[Special:MyPage/common.js|your common.js]] or [[meta:Special:MyPage/global.js|global.js]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="javascript"> mw.loader.load('//en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Nardog/AutoTestcases.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript'); </syntaxhighlight>
Or you may enable the [[User:Enterprisey/script-installer|script installer]] in {{myprefs|Gadgets}} and click "Install" in the infobox on this page.
{{User:Nardog/scripts}}
